name: Chef's Barbeque Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat.
2. Add the onions and sauté until softened, stirring occasionally to prevent burning.
3. Mix in all other ingredients.
4. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for at least 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the sauce has thickened to your desired consistency.
